prompt_template:
Write about real-world applications of laser cleaning for {material} across different industries. Target audience: {target_audience} in {industry_focus}.

Requirements:
- Exactly {word_target} words
- Natural, engaging tone (target: {natural_voice_target})
- Cover automotive, aerospace, manufacturing, and restoration industries
- Include specific examples of {material} cleaning applications
- Mention benefits over traditional cleaning methods
- Technical depth appropriate for: {technical_depth}
- Include economic and efficiency advantages
- Do not use headers or bullet points
- Write in flowing paragraphs

Content quality must meet threshold: {content_quality_threshold}
